own_review_points: RunTimeConfigurationGenerator generated config field should be volatile if read across threads (human ref) - thread-safe publication of static config holder
phase.isReadAtMain() refactor changes error path: BOOTSTRAP now also hits 'cannot be consumed here' - verify intended
C_READ_CONFIG descriptor gained List param; bootstrap source list must be passed (empty list when none)
New BOOTSTRAP ConfigPhase not documented in writing-extensions.adoc
Logger class mismatch (copy-paste) attributes logs to wrong class
notes: v8 found a genuine copy-paste Logger bug (good) and a real undocumented BOOTSTRAP phase doc gap (good). The other three points are speculative 'verify/confirm' restatements that surface no defect. It missed the human-reference volatile/safe-publication concern on the generated config field. Solid but shallow; net barely positive.
